goal: Fix the character-encyclopedia stand portraits whose backgrounds are not truly transparent so they display cleanly in CharactersView without changing the character content itself.
constraints: Do not alter the actual character subject, costume, pose, or in-image content beyond background cleanup.
Do not modify CharactersView layout or unrelated UI code unless needed to consume the corrected assets.
Prefer non-destructive asset replacement and keep filenames stable where the existing UI already references them.
Limit edits to the task file, the affected portrait assets, and any minimal supporting notes required by the workflow.
deliverables: Affected stand portraits in public/assets/chars/stand use transparent backgrounds instead of incorrect solid backgrounds.
CharactersView continues to load the same filenames without code-path regressions.
A short verification summary identifies which portraits were corrected.
